deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv, Schertz TX
deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. 31 comps, avg $207K. CMA template pilot.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas, Elmendorf TX
deals.notes: Land/acreage listing canceled. Development interest from Isaac Linares ($150K contingent offer) did not move forward. Signs picked up, no path with sellers or Isaac.

logs.m: Listing canceled, walking away. Signs picked up last week.
Isaac development interest discussed. Sisters enthusiastic about mobile home concept for displaced veterans.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr, Devine TX
deals.notes: VA loan listing terminated by mutual agreement. Clients moving back in to make repairs/updates before relisting. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Short sale was recommended path.

logs.m: Mutual termination agreement signed. Clients moving back in. Plan to relist after updates.
Chandler laid off. Called with three paths: short sale, assumption, or bring cash to close. Leaning toward short sale.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path, San Antonio TX
deals.notes: Listed May 14 at $259,900. 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft. Second-look buyers are hottest lead - their favorite property. Multiple interested parties. Roof claim approved, foundation crack flagged.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time, follow up with second-look buyers agent on movement

logs.m: Investor cash offer discussed at $176,300, keeping conversation open with sellers.
MLS live, canvassed neighborhood, sign and lockbox dropped. First showing 9:15am.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462, Moore TX
deals.notes: Divorce sale, 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Market value $275K-$315K. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10 miles. Recommend list at $295K.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing, get listing agreement signed, schedule photos

logs.m: Met at property 10am. CMA pulled, payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. Built net sheet.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751, Devine TX
deals.contact: Priority Bank FSB (Kelly, Jerry Sadler, Ray Stidham)
deals.notes: Bank REO cleanup in progress. HouzzPro contractor (Matt Toney). Electric reconnected, flooring starts this week, water meter pending. Cameras installed. Estimated ready for listing soon.
deals.next: Confirm utilities setup with Medina Electric and EMCSUD, replace camera batteries, submit listing agreement to bank

logs.m: Visited property - electricians reconnected, drywall complete, flooring starts tomorrow or Thursday, water meter 1-2 days.
Work officially started with HouzzPro/San Antonio Remodeling.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac, Tilden TX

logs.m: New qualified buyers - Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier for price update. EMD not yet received.
Property clearing complete by seller. New photos posted to social media.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Cleared Apr 26.
Lien release signed at mobile notary by Fernando Castillo, delivered to Chicago Title.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Military retirement + 2 daughters disability income. Paying $1,700/mo rent, motivated to buy. VA loan eligible zero down. Between jobs, proactively fixing credit. Last contact Apr 29 - sick grandkid, follow up today.
leads.next: Call today, connect with VA lender, qualify budget and area

logs.m: Flagged overdue for follow-up. Do not let slip again.
Spoke today, sick grandkid, will follow up tomorrow.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold, need to move faster. Out of Corpus deal, pivoting to new construction. No HOA firm requirement. Connected with lenders Zach Schaphorst and Erik Williams. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal at $85K (Corpus Christi).
leads.next: Follow up after Isaac/Mike phone call, revisit new construction search if Saxet falls through

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal - too much for them. Still actively searching.
Connected with Isaac on 301 W Saxet wholesale deal at $85K. Mike and Isaac scheduled to talk.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped him get started in real estate. Opportunity 1: Uncle Jimbo rental setup at 8527 Green Bliss (backed out May 28, $500 sent). Opportunity 2: Brandon's mom Milagros Stringer new construction buyer - $50K down, target ~$1,000/mo payment.

Milagros buyer rep signed. Rental setup docs in folder.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon's mom, new construction buyer. Budget ~$50K down, target payment ~$1,000/mo (P+I). Not locked to Grace Gardens - need options from all builders. Pre-approval status unknown. Builder rate buydowns are the angle.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach Schaphorst, pull builder options, coordinate visits

logs.m: Buyer rep sent this morning - not yet signed. Need to prioritize follow up.

logs.m: Met Bryce on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife active military, VA loan eligible, currently renting.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed, son inherited house.
